type.description: Dispatch job type, passed to createJob as the type argument.

objective_type.description: Grid assignment objective class. RUNECHAIN grid specs use inference jobs.

capability.description: Worker capability required for the job, passed to createJob as capabilityRequired.

planner.description: Planner or executor family expected to handle this assignment.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the assignment produces.

prompt_template.description: Self-contained prompt text used as the job prompt.

gold_reward.description: Positive Gold reward for a completed assignment.

output_schema.description: Expected structure of the assignment output.
